title: CDC via WAL Streaming (Debezium)
description: Master the principles of Change Data Capture (CDC) via Write-Ahead Log (WAL) streaming using tools like Debezium. Architect low-latency data synchronization solutions between primary databases and downstream search or analytics engines, eliminating the need for double-writes.
objectives: Master the principles of Change Data Capture (CDC) via Write-Ahead Log (WAL) streaming using tools like Debezium.
Architect low-latency data synchronization solutions between primary databases and downstream search or analytics engines, eliminating the need for double-writes.
